components.label: No requested partner in participated period
Repeated overlap beyond one repeated two-period groupmate
Second event mentor in a group
Sexi mentor spread, overload, and max-load unevenness

overview: Strict normal-pool quotas were not all feasible, so the solver returned the best relaxed-feasible compromise.
Leader hard-rule violations: assignments=0, role-balance=0, group-role=0.
Sexi distribution in period 1: min 2, max 2, counts [2, 2, 2, 2, 2, 2, 2, 2, 2, 2].
Sexi distribution in period 2: min 2, max 3, counts [2, 2, 2, 2, 2, 2, 3, 2, 2, 2].

hard_constraint_statuses.title: Participation assignment counts
hard_constraint_statuses.summary: Each one-period mentor was assigned once and each two-period mentor was assigned once per period.

hard_constraint_statuses.title: Leader head/vice structure
hard_constraint_statuses.summary: Every group received exactly one head and one vice, and each leader was head once and vice once.

hard_constraint_statuses.title: International hard assignments
hard_constraint_statuses.summary: 8 of 8 mentors marked for international were assigned there in every participated period.

hard_constraint_statuses.title: Event mentor hard maximum
hard_constraint_statuses.summary: No group exceeded the absolute maximum of two event mentors.

hard_constraint_statuses.title: Non-international cap
hard_constraint_statuses.summary: No non-international mentor was assigned to an international group in both periods.

soft_goal_statuses.title: Normal-pool quotas
soft_goal_statuses.summary: Exact normal-pool quota shape was achieved in 18 of 20 group-periods.
details: Strict quota mode was infeasible, so quota deviations were relaxed and penalized.

soft_goal_statuses.title: Non-requested international placements
soft_goal_statuses.summary: 15 non-international mentors were placed in an international group.
details: Mentors explicitly marked international are now treated as a hard assignment, not a preference.

soft_goal_statuses.title: Requested partners per participated period
soft_goal_statuses.summary: 158 of 203 mentor-period request checks were satisfied.
details: Period 1: 85 of 102 mentors with wishes got at least one requested partner.
Period 2: 73 of 101 mentors with wishes got at least one requested partner.

soft_goal_statuses.title: Preferred periods for one-period normal mentors
soft_goal_statuses.summary: 26 of 40 one-period normal mentors received their preferred period.

soft_goal_statuses.title: Repeated normal two-period groupmates
soft_goal_statuses.summary: 34 repeated normal two-period pairings remained across periods.

soft_goal_statuses.title: Distribution balance
soft_goal_statuses.summary: Sexi mentors, event mentors, gender, and year were balanced as evenly as possible.
details: Sexi spread target was enforced directly (max 3 per group and max spread 2).
Sexi distribution: period 1 min 2, max 2, counts [2, 2, 2, 2, 2, 2, 2, 2, 2, 2].
Sexi distribution: period 2 min 2, max 3, counts [2, 2, 2, 2, 2, 2, 3, 2, 2, 2].
Sexi distribution stayed within the target band of max 3 per group and max spread 2.

compromises: P1 Group 5: normal one-period 2 (baseline 2), normal two-period 6 (baseline 5), extra normal mentors 1 of 0.
P2 Group 6: normal one-period 1 (baseline 2), normal two-period 5 (baseline 5), extra normal mentors 0 of 0.
